'''shamungu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:seacow|seacow]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| sh-m-ng
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:seacow|seacow]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| shamungu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:shæmingith|shæmingith]] || [[word:shæmingij|shæmingij]] || [[word:shæmingish|shæmingish]] || [[word:shæmingi|shæmingi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:shamumunguth|shamumunguth]] || [[word:shamumunguj|shamumunguj]] || [[word:shamumungush|shamumungush]] || [[word:shamumungu|shamumungu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:shamunguth|shamunguth]] || [[word:shamunguj|shamunguj]] || [[word:shamungush|shamungush]] || [[word:shamungu|shamungu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:shamufnguth|shamufnguth]] || [[word:shamufnguj|shamufnguj]] || [[word:shamufngush|shamufngush]] || [[word:shamufnguf|shamufnguf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:shamunguthu|shamunguthu]] || [[word:shamunguju|shamunguju]] || [[word:shamungushu|shamungushu]] || [[word:shamunguku|shamunguku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:shamunguth|shamunguth]] || [[word:shamunguj|shamunguj]] || [[word:shamungush|shamungush]] || [[word:shamungu|shamungu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:shamunguthul|shamunguthul]] || [[word:shamungujul|shamungujul]] || [[word:shamungushul|shamungushul]] || [[word:shamungukul|shamungukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:shamunguthuthu|shamunguthuthu]] || [[word:shamungujuju|shamungujuju]] || [[word:shamungushushu|shamungushushu]] || [[word:shamunguku|shamunguku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:shamunguthun|shamunguthun]] || [[word:shamungujun|shamungujun]] || [[word:shamungushun|shamungushun]] || [[word:shamungukun|shamungukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:shamunguthuoro|shamunguthuoro]] || [[word:shamungujuoro|shamungujuoro]] || [[word:shamungushuoro|shamungushuoro]] || [[word:shamungukuoro|shamungukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki child nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|ed5025b}}
